proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +40.7pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Portfolio is 100% Choppy across 41 open positions with UP_TRI at 95% of exposure — if regime flips to Bear, this Bear-gated UP_TRI cohort would activate atop already-heavy UP_TRI concentration; monitor for compounding risk at activation
D-8 R-multiple distribution review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance) still pending and could downgrade tier
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +40.7pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +40.7pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, day 7), so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration on 41 open positions is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-24) and no trader rejection on record.

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +30.8pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +30.8pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, day 7), so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration trigger on 41 open positions is not compounded; a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 06-24) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank (29.27%); UP_TRI (95.1%) (29.3%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector + by_signal_type = Choppy (100%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank (29.27%); UP_TRI (95.1%); recommended action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and any new UP_TRI adds in Choppy regime until Bank cell drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits. Consider a NIFTY Bank short hedge (sized to ~30% of book notional) to neutralize the Bank concentration while waiting for cohort validation.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the fully long, Bank-heavy book simultaneously with no statistical edge to justify holding through the drawdown; Bank sector beta amplifies the broad-market unwind, and the 29% Bank cell becomes the single largest loss vector.

evidence: UP_TRI×Choppy×FMCG cell = 6/41 = 14.63% (below cell threshold but elevated)
UP_TRI×Choppy×Chem cell = 5/41 = 12.20% (below cell threshold but elevated)
Signal-type: UP_TRI = 39/41 = 95.1% (above 0.85 threshold); book is 41/41 = 100% directional long
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort at Candidate tier (n=256) — unvalidated edge for all three concentrated cells
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in sector=Bank and any new UP_TRI adds in Choppy regime until Bank cell drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits. Consider a NIFTY Bank short hedge (sized to ~30% of book notional) to neutralize the Bank concentration while waiting for cohort validation.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the fully long, Bank-heavy book simultaneously with no statistical edge to justify holding through the drawdown; Bank sector beta amplifies the broad-market unwind, and the 29% Bank cell becomes the single largest loss vector.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 29.27% (12 of 41 positions). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 39/41 = 95.1% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=256) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
